top_signals.title: Russia Spring Wheat Planting Continues to Lag on Poor Weather
top_signals.summary: Russian spring wheat planting continues to face delays as persistent rain hinders growers, risking lower harvests.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian Owner of Swiss Gold Refiner Probed for Inflating Revenue
top_signals.summary: India’s markets regulator has alleged that the owner of Swiss gold refiner Valcambi SA overstated revenue, according to an interim order issued Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Stardust Power joins Department of Energy-backed lithium extraction program
top_signals.summary: The project:  “Coal- and Waste Coal-based Electrodes for Direct Lithium Extraction from Domestic Waste Streams,” was selected for award negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dodgers’ Shohei Ohtani shines on mound and at plate in win over Diamondbacks
top_signals.summary: Kyle Tucker had three hits including a two-run homer for the Dodgers, who have won the past two after dropping ​the opener of the four-game series.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Surge Battery raises $21M for Nevada lithium project
top_signals.summary: The financing is being led by Brian Paes-Braga, managing partner at SAF Group, and Michael Hess of Hess Capital.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals gets NOAA compliance
top_signals.summary: The company is one of several that aim to explore the sea, where polymetallic nodules found on the deep ocean floor contain critical minerals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: USA Rare Earth finalizes $1.6B funding with Commerce Department
top_signals.summary: The company now has $3.5 billion in capital to fund its growth plans, USAR said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
